title: OLAP for Software Engineers
description: A software-engineering-first approach to data engineering on top of the base infrastructure. MooseStack provides typed schemas, automated migrations, built-in MCP server, and hot-reloading dev environment. The agent works within a unified framework instead of wiring independent tools.
installScript: npm install -g @514labs/moose-cli@0.6.424 && mkdir -p /opt/dec-bench/moose && cd /opt/dec-bench/moose && npm init -y && npm install @514labs/moose-lib@0.6.424
